title: taraxacum sylvaticum
intro: Taraxacum sylvaticum, also known as the woodland dandelion, is a type of wild dandelion that grows in woodland areas and is a member of the Asteraceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to soothe and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum sylvaticum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
